title: carya ovalis f. ellipsoidalis
intro: Carya ovalis f. ellipsoidalis, also known as the American hickory, is a deciduous tree native to the eastern and central regions of North America. The bark and nuts of this tree have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Carya ovalis f. ellipsoidalis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures made from its bark and nuts, which can be used to treat various ailments.
